title: Gāyatrī — 3×8 invocation
prompt: Compose a single gāyatrī (24 syllables, three pādas of 8) addressed to citi-śakti as illuminator of cognition.
constraint: gāyatrī chandas; three pādas of 8 syllables each; addressed to a single ablative-case noun.
notes: Live cascade run for v0.4.1 (--mode live). Validator status is reported honestly; v0.4 has no chandas-aware scorer.
